name: Rhubarb and Nut Streusel Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine 3/4 cup sugar and corn starch. Stir over medium heat until the mixture forms a smooth paste.
2. Add rhubarb to the sugar mixture. Cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture boils and thickens. Remove from heat and let cool.
3. Whisk together milk and vinegar in a separate bowl.
4. In a large bowl, combine flour with 1 1/2 cups sugar. Cut butter into the flour mixture until it forms a crumbly texture.
5. Stir baking powder, baking soda, and chopped nuts into the flour mixture. Add the beaten egg and milk mixture to the flour mixture. Mix until just combined.
6. Pour 2/3 of the batter into a prepared 9-inch spring form pan. Spread rhubarb filling over the batter.
7. Drop spoonfuls of remaining batter over the rhubarb, then sprinkle with the reserved streusel mixture.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 50 minutes.
